name: Passover Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the honey until it reaches boiling point; add orange juice and grated orange rind.
2. Allow mixture to cool completely.
3. Beat egg yolks separately.
4. Gradually add oil, sugar, sifted matzo meal, salt, cinnamon, and cloves to the yolk mixture.
5. Incorporate the dry ingredients into the yolk mixture gently.
6. Stir in the stiffly beaten egg whites until combined.
7. Pour batter into one oblong or two loaf pans lined with wax paper.
8. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
